title: Hunter Hoffman - Service Contract Agreement
summary: Agency agreement between Hunter Hoffman and Empyrean Creative LLC. Antony's agency provides marketing services. Includes NDA, IP ownership, payment terms ($1200/month minimum 4 months). Exhibit A references website build, social media management, email marketing.

title: Systems Inventory
summary: The "Universal Short-Form Virality Bible" — comprehensive content creation manual. Covers strategy foundations, hooks, retention, storytelling, CTAs, editing, platform tactics. Not a systems inventory of tools — it's a content production methodology document.

title: Antony F. Munoz (Personal Brand)
summary: Framework multiplication blueprint for personal development canon. Defines spinal governance layer, framework design rules, vehicle architecture (Initiate Arena, Game of Lyfe, Sovereign Path), incarnation modes, naming conventions, pricing architecture, and anti-drift constraints.

title: Coaching Philosophy/Methodology
summary: Layered framework philosophy (spinal→nested→sub-nested). Defines Initiate Arena, Game of Lyfe, Sovereign Path as progression sequence. Includes archetypes system, skills architecture, progress trackers, sales call scripts, outreach system (30 DMs/day), founding cohort V1 spec ($750/90 days).
